title: Fit test - 2nd screen Fail and Cancel
scenario: Fit Test returns to Device Settings when failed or cancelled on the 2nd screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a device that supports Fit Test connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Tap "Start Test" to begin the fit test.
5. On the 2nd screen of the fit test, either fail the test or tap "Cancel".
6. Observe that the fit test screen closes and the user is returned to Device Settings.
7. Tap "Cancel" again on the Device Settings screen to confirm the behavior.
expected: The fit test screen closes and the user returns to Device Settings. Tapping Cancel again on Device Settings confirms the app remains on Device Settings without any unexpected behavior.
